name: Solitaire Roguelite

keywords: solitaire, klondike solitaire, free solitaire, solitaire online, roguelite, card game, joker cards, browser game, no download
tips: Save Joker cards for moments when you're completely stuck — they're your most powerful resource
Always uncover face-down cards first before making moves with face-up cards
Build tableau columns in alternating colors and descending order to maximize options
Empty columns are extremely valuable — fill them strategically with Kings
Plan multiple moves ahead instead of immediately playing the first available card
howToPlay: Play Klondike Solitaire by moving cards between columns in descending order with alternating colors. Move Aces to foundation piles and build up to King. Joker cards can break normal rules — use them strategically for maximum score.
aboutGame: Solitaire Roguelite combines classic Klondike Solitaire with roguelite mechanics. Play the card game you know, but with rule-breaking Joker cards that add strategic depth and replay value. Each run presents different Joker opportunities, making every session unique. Features score multipliers, daily leaderboards, and cloud saves across devices.

faq.a: Yes. Play free on Weekly Arcade with no ads, no downloads, and no account required. Sign in optionally for leaderboards and cloud saves.

faq.q: What makes Solitaire Roguelite different from regular Solitaire?
faq.a: Joker cards that break normal rules - they can match any card, clear columns, or multiply your score. The roguelite element means each run offers different Joker opportunities.

faq.q: Can I save my Solitaire progress?
faq.a: Yes. Sign in with Google to save your progress to the cloud and continue playing across devices. Guest play works too but progress is local to your browser.
